title: Find My Device - Stop button
scenario: Find My Device Stop button does not stop the tone or re-enable the Play button after starting the tone
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
Locate the Find My Device section (blue geo icon).
Tap the Play button to start the Find My Device tone.
While the tone is playing, tap the Stop button.
expected: The tone stops immediately, and the Play button becomes available again (replaces the Stop button).
